ValidationRule.description: Updated by PwC as part of SC-433 - Consumables and Service Contract record types excluded from the validation
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND($Setup.Rules_Execution__c.Run__c, RecordType.DeveloperName <> 'Consumables', RecordType.DeveloperName <> 'ServiceContract', AND(( INCLUDES(LSS_Bid_Competitor__c, "other") ), LSS_Bid_competitor_Other__c ="" ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_OPP_013: If "Other" competitor is selected, provide details
